items.name: Hellion Helmet (Recruit)
items.description:
Hellions are foul creatures, born of tar and muck, the brainchild of jilted gods and a sorcerer driven to madness. They are a cruel and war-minded kind, where only the strongest can exist, and they wear the filth of their misdeeds as trophies. Misbegotten, they do not create, only imitate and destroy.
